update_every.title: Update every
update_every.description: Data collection interval, measured in seconds.

dsn.title: DSN
dsn.description: Microsoft SQL Server [Data Source Name](https://github.com/microsoft/go-mssqldb#connection-parameters-and-dsn). When `cloud_auth.provider` is `azure_ad`, use URL format with `sqlserver://` scheme.

cloud_auth.title: Cloud auth
cloud_auth.description: Optional cloud authentication settings for Azure SQL.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Cloud auth provider. Use `none` to disable cloud authentication.

azure_ad.title: Azure AD
azure_ad.description: Microsoft Entra (Azure AD) settings used when provider is `azure_ad`.

mode_service_principal.title: Service Principal
mode_service_principal.description: Service principal settings used when mode is `service_principal`.

mode_managed_identity.title: Managed Identity
mode_managed_identity.description: Managed identity settings used when mode is `managed_identity`.

client_id.title: Client ID
client_id.description: Optional client ID of a user-assigned managed identity.

vnode.title: Virtual Node
vnode.description: Associates this data collection job with a [Virtual Node](https://learn.netdata.cloud/docs/netdata-agent/configuration/organize-systems-metrics-and-alerts#virtual-nodes).

functions.title: Functions
functions.description: Configuration for Netdata functions exposed by this collector.

top_queries.title: Top Queries
top_queries.description: Configuration for the top-queries function using SQL Server Query Store.

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: Query timeout in seconds. Set to 0 to use the collector's timeout.

limit.title: Limit
limit.description: Maximum number of queries to return. Set to 0 to use the default (500).

time_window_days.title: Time Window (Days)
time_window_days.description: How many days of Query Store data to query. Set to 0 to use the default (7). Set to -1 to query all available data (not recommended for busy servers).

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: Query timeout in seconds. Set to 0 to use the collector's timeout.

use_ring_buffer.title: Use Ring Buffer
use_ring_buffer.description: Use ring_buffer target instead of event_file for system_health session. Enable for Azure SQL Database without blob storage.

timeout.title: Timeout
timeout.description: Query timeout in seconds. Set to 0 to use the collector's timeout.

session_name.title: Session Name
session_name.description: Name of the Extended Events session that captures error_reported events.

use_ring_buffer.title: Use Ring Buffer
use_ring_buffer.description: Use ring_buffer target instead of event_file. Enable for Azure SQL Database without blob storage.

vnode.ui:help: Optional: Group metrics under a virtual node for multi-instance setups.

timeout.ui:help: Accepts decimals for sub-second granularity (e.g., 0.5 for 500ms).

mode.ui:help:
Choose how Netdata gets Azure credentials.

- `service_principal`: Use an Azure app / service principal. Requires `tenant_id`, `client_id`, and `client_secret` in `mode_service_principal`.
- `managed_identity`: Use the managed identity attached to the Azure resource running Netdata. Set `mode_managed_identity.client_id` only for a user-assigned identity.
- `default`: Use the Azure SDK `DefaultAzureCredential` chain. This automatically tries available Azure credential sources, such as environment-based credentials, managed identity, and local developer credentials.

Use `service_principal` for explicit app credentials. Use `managed_identity` when Netdata runs on an Azure resource with an attached identity. Use `default` when you want Azure SDK auto-discovery or local development convenience.

disabled.ui:help: WARNING: Query Store may contain unmasked PII (customer names, emails, IDs) in query text.

time_window_days.ui:help: Limits Query Store data to recent days. Lower values improve performance on busy servers.

disabled.ui:help: WARNING: Query text may contain unmasked sensitive literals. Requires VIEW SERVER STATE permission.

use_ring_buffer.ui:help: Enable for Azure SQL Database or environments without event_file access. Ring buffer can be slower.

disabled.ui:help: WARNING: Error messages and query text may contain unmasked sensitive literals. Requires VIEW SERVER STATE permission.

session_name.ui:help: The Extended Events session must be created by an administrator and include an event_file target capturing sqlserver.error_reported with sql_text action.

use_ring_buffer.ui:help: Enable for Azure SQL Database or environments without event_file access. Ring buffer can be slower.
